basic_details.job_title: FDDI Junior Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design and Development Institute (FDDI) Recruitment 2026: Footwear Design and Development Institute has released the official notification for 2 Junior Faculty posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Bihar. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.details: General: 35 years OBC: 38 years (3 years relaxation) SC/ST: 40 years (5 years relaxation) PWD: 45 years (10 years relaxation)

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree (min. two years duration after Graduation) in relevant fields with min. 55% marks.
qualification.details: Jr. Faculty (School of Fashion Design): Master's Degree (min. two years duration after Graduation) in Fashion Design / Textile Design / Graphic Design / Communication Design / Apparel Design / Lifestyle Accessory Design / Knitwear Design / Leather Design / Fashion Technology / Textile & Clothing / Fashion Management with min. 55% marks from a recognized University/Institute. Academic and/or Industry Experience of at least One year in the field of Illustration and fiber and Yarns. Other fashion design subjects. Academic experience, if any, should be of teaching in UG degree or higher academic courses. Jr. Faculty (School of Retail And Fashion Merchandise): Master's Degree (of min. 02 years duration after Graduation) or PG Diploma (of min. 2 years after Graduation) in Management / Retail Management / Fashion Management / Textiles & Clothing / Fabric & Apparel Science / Fashion Technology / Apparel Merchandising / Retail Merchandising / Retail and Fashion Merchandising / with min. 55% marks from a recognized university/Institute. Academic and/or Industry Experience of at least One year in the field of E-commerce, Fashion Merchandising / Retail Merchandising /Apparel Merchandising /Fashion Management/ IT Applications Subjects. Academic experience, if any, should be of teaching in UG degree or higher academic courses.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of Rs.50,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FDDI Junior Faculty Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FDDI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FDDI Junior Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the FDDI Junior Faculty positions is 15th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree (minimum two years duration after Graduation) in relevant fields with at least 55% marks from a recognized university or institute. Specific fields are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Faculty position?
faq.answer: The age limit is 35 years for General candidates, 38 years for OBC, 40 years for SC/ST, and 45 years for PWD candidates, with applicable age relaxations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Faculty role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 50,000/- per month for the Junior Faculty position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Faculty position at the Footwear Design and Development Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the FDDI Junior Faculty recruitment must be submitted online through the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the FDDI Junior Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Faculty position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Faculty position will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the FDDI Patna Campus located?
faq.answer: The FDDI Patna Campus is located at B6P Mega Industrial Park, Amhara, Near Hero Cycle, Bihta – 801106, Patna, Bihar.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions, meaning the engagement will be on a contract basis.
